summary: Verified all 7 fixes for iteration 12 (Blueprint Flow follow-ups). Backend pytest: 7/7 passed. UI Playwright: 20/20 assertions passed across 4 roles/pages. FIX1: admin project tab bar shows exactly one 'Drawing Register' (7 tabs total: Building, Uploaded Drawings, Breach Timeline, Analytics, Team, Revisions, Drawing Register). FIX2: department capsules render 'a/n' (observed: Interior 4/13, Structure/Architecture 0/3, MEP 2/10, Woodwork 0/2 on Ground Floor); All/Assigned/Unassigned filter chips present and functional — Assigned filter returns only rows without assign-btn/checkbox (1 row shown, all assigned); assigned drawings sort to top via sort predicate in FloorRegister L864. FIX3: With unassigned filter active, 'Bulk assign · select all unassigned' (bulk-select-all) shows above list; clicking selects every unassigned row, reveals dark bulk-assign-bar with bulk-assign-confirm 'Assign selected', and disables all 12 individual assign-btn-<catId> buttons (verified 12/12 disabled). FIX4: On sudama's APPROVED task cmqhpakn2000pigcdzsaoscjt, onsite-open-review-btn opens DrawingReviewModal; clicking edit-outcome-btn opens custom styled reopen-confirm-dialog with reopen-cancel-btn + reopen-confirm-btn — window.confirm no longer used; Cancel closes dialog with no state change. Backend reopen flow tested end-to-end (approve→reopen→verify PENDING_REVIEW→re-approve to restore). FIX5: Designer amarpreet's Drawing Register tab defaults to designer-floor-chip-ALL, list shows 'on N floors' text, clicking designer-self-assign-<catId> opens SelfAssignModal with a Floor label (Select dropdown for multi-floor candidates) + Off-site Reviewer + Deadline + designer-self-assign-submit. FIX6: Admin RegisterTab 'Add Drawing' modal exposes drawing-floor-all 'All floors' toggle button. FIX7: GET /api/dashboard?projectId=<id> as designer returns cards {total,assigned,submitted,approved,rejected,overdue} + charts{approvalRate,onTimeRate,floorProgress,workload,deadlines}; UI renders designer-analytics, designer-deadlines panel, 'My Performance' with On-time/Approval meters, and 'My Progress by Floor' section. Light regression: /api/projects as designer returns ONLY TEST-SANDBOX (member project); no 'Structure' label leaked (STRUCTURE→'Architecture' mapping preserved).
critical_code_review_comments: page.tsx TABS array uses two entries with label 'Drawing Register' — one keyed REGISTER_VIEW (DESIGNER-only) and one keyed SETTINGS (ADMIN-only). Filtering by role correctly yields exactly one per user, but future refactor could rename SETTINGS→REGISTER_ADMIN to avoid confusion.

FloorRegister sort predicate `(taskByCat.has(a.id) ? 0 : 1) - (taskByCat.has(b.id) ? 0 : 1)` is a stable boolean sort — works because JS sort is stable in Node 12+. Fine, but a comment or extracted helper (`const isAssigned = c => taskByCat.has(c.id)`) would improve readability.

DrawingReviewModal.tsx: confirmReopen overlay uses zIndex:5 inside a maxed-out modal (parent zIndex:95). Overlay works because it's positioned absolute inside the panel; ensure future stacking (toasts, tooltips) don't cover it.
app/api/dashboard/route.ts DESIGNER branch returns onTimeRate=100 when total=0 — a friendly default; consider surfacing 'N/A' or null when there is no data instead of a misleading 100%.

DesignerRegisterTab SelfAssignModal — when browsing a single floor chip, floor is fixed; when browsing ALL, floor is a Select. Behavior matches spec. Consider a data-testid on the Select trigger (e.g., designer-self-assign-floor-select) for deterministic automation.
